verses.latin_vulgate: Quis dabit capiti meo aquam,  et oculis meis fontem lacrimarum,  et plorabo die ac nocte interfectos filiæ populi mei ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִֽי־יִתֵּ֤ן רֹאשִׁי֙ מַ֔יִם וְעֵינִ֖י מְק֣וֹר דִּמְעָ֑ה וְאֶבְכֶּה֙ יוֹמָ֣ם וָלַ֔יְלָה אֵ֖ת חַֽלְלֵ֥י בַת־עַמִּֽי׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Oh that my head were waters, and mine eyes a fountain of tears, that I might weep day and night for the slain of the daughter of my people!

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis dabit me in solitudine diversorium viatorum,  et derelinquam populum meum,  et recedam ab eis ?  quia omnes adulteri sunt,  cœtus prævaricatorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִֽי־יִתְּנֵ֣נִי בַמִּדְבָּ֗ר מְלוֹן֙ אֹֽרְחִ֔ים וְאֶֽעֶזְבָה֙ אֶת־עַמִּ֔י וְאֵלְכָ֖ה מֵאִתָּ֑ם כִּ֤י כֻלָּם֙ מְנָ֣אֲפִ֔ים עֲצֶ֖רֶת בֹּגְדִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Oh that I had in the wilderness a lodging place of wayfaring men; that I might leave my people, and go from them! for they be all adulterers, an assembly of treacherous men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et extenderunt linguam suam  quasi arcum mendacii et non veritatis :  confortati sunt in terra,  quia de malo ad malum egressi sunt,  et me non cognoverunt, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיַּדְרְכ֤וּ אֶת־לְשׁוֹנָם֙ קַשְׁתָּ֣ם שֶׁ֔קֶר וְלֹ֥א לֶאֱמוּנָ֖ה גָּבְר֣וּ בָאָ֑רֶץ כִּי֩ מֵרָעָ֨ה אֶל־רָעָ֧ה ׀ יָצָ֛אוּ וְאֹתִ֥י לֹא־יָדָ֖עוּ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And they bend their tongues like their bow for lies: but they are not valiant for the truth upon the earth; for they proceed from evil to evil, and they know not me, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Unusquisque se a proximo suo custodiat,  et in omni fratre suo non habeat fiduciam :  quia omnis frater supplantans supplantabit,  et omnis amicus fraudulenter incedet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִ֤ישׁ מֵרֵעֵ֙הוּ֙ הִשָּׁמֵ֔רוּ וְעַל־כׇּל־אָ֖ח אַל־תִּבְטָ֑חוּ כִּ֤י כׇל־אָח֙ עָק֣וֹב יַעְקֹ֔ב וְכׇל־רֵ֖עַ רָכִ֥יל יַהֲלֹֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Take ye heed every one of his neighbour, and trust ye not in any brother: for every brother will utterly supplant, and every neighbour will walk with slanders.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vir fratrem suum deridebit,  et veritatem non loquentur :  docuerunt enim linguam suam loqui mendacium ;  ut inique agerent laboraverunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִ֤ישׁ בְּרֵעֵ֙הוּ֙ יְהָתֵ֔לּוּ וֶאֱמֶ֖ת לֹ֣א יְדַבֵּ֑רוּ לִמְּד֧וּ לְשׁוֹנָ֛ם דַּבֶּר־שֶׁ֖קֶר הַעֲוֵ֥ה נִלְאֽוּ׃
verses.king_james: And they will deceive every one his neighbour, and will not speak the truth: they have taught their tongue to speak lies, and weary themselves to commit iniquity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Habitatio tua in medio doli :  in dolo renuerunt scire me, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁבְתְּךָ֖ בְּת֣וֹךְ מִרְמָ֑ה בְּמִרְמָ֛ה מֵאֲנ֥וּ דַעַת־אוֹתִ֖י נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Thine habitation is in the midst of deceit; through deceit they refuse to know me, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea hæc dicit Dominus exercituum :  Ecce ego conflabo, et probabo eos :  quid enim aliud faciam a facie filiæ populi mei ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֔וֹת הִנְנִ֥י צוֹרְפָ֖ם וּבְחַנְתִּ֑ים כִּי־אֵ֣יךְ אֶֽעֱשֶׂ֔ה מִפְּנֵ֖י בַּת־עַמִּֽי׃
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord of hosts, Behold, I will melt them, and try them; for how shall I do for the daughter of my people?

verses.latin_vulgate: Sagitta vulnerans lingua eorum,  dolum locuta est.  In ore suo pacem cum amico suo loquitur,  et occulte ponit ei insidias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֵ֥ץ (שוחט) [שָׁח֛וּט] לְשׁוֹנָ֖ם מִרְמָ֣ה דִבֵּ֑ר בְּפִ֗יו שָׁל֤וֹם אֶת־רֵעֵ֙הוּ֙ יְדַבֵּ֔ר וּבְקִרְבּ֖וֹ יָשִׂ֥ים אׇרְבּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Their tongue is as an arrow shot out; it speaketh deceit: one speaketh peaceably to his neighbour with his mouth, but in heart he layeth his wait.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid super his non visitabo, dicit Dominus,  aut in gente hujusmodi non ulciscetur anima mea ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַעַל־אֵ֥לֶּה לֹא־אֶפְקׇד־בָּ֖ם נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה אִ֚ם בְּג֣וֹי אֲשֶׁר־כָּזֶ֔ה לֹ֥א תִתְנַקֵּ֖ם נַפְשִֽׁי׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Shall I not visit them for these things? saith the Lord: shall not my soul be avenged on such a nation as this?

verses.latin_vulgate: Super montes assumam fletum ac lamentum,  et super speciosa deserti planctum,  quoniam incensa sunt, eo quod non sit vir pertransiens,  et non audierunt vocem possidentis :  a volucre cæli usque ad pecora transmigraverunt et recesserunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־הֶ֨הָרִ֜ים אֶשָּׂ֧א בְכִ֣י וָנֶ֗הִי וְעַל־נְא֤וֹת מִדְבָּר֙ קִינָ֔ה כִּ֤י נִצְּתוּ֙ מִבְּלִי־אִ֣ישׁ עֹבֵ֔ר וְלֹ֥א שָׁמְע֖וּ ק֣וֹל מִקְנֶ֑ה מֵע֤וֹף הַשָּׁמַ֙יִם֙ וְעַד־בְּהֵמָ֔ה נָדְד֖וּ הָלָֽכוּ׃
verses.king_james: For the mountains will I take up a weeping and wailing, and for the habitations of the wilderness a lamentation, because they are burned up, so that none can pass through them; neither can men hear the voice of the cattle; both the fowl of the heavens and the beast are fled; they are gone.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dabo Jerusalem in acervos arenæ,  et cubilia draconum :  et civitates Juda dabo in desolationem,  eo quod non sit habitator.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַתִּ֧י אֶת־יְרוּשָׁלַ֛͏ִם לְגַלִּ֖ים מְע֣וֹן תַּנִּ֑ים וְאֶת־עָרֵ֧י יְהוּדָ֛ה אֶתֵּ֥ן שְׁמָמָ֖ה מִבְּלִ֥י יוֹשֵֽׁב׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And I will make Jerusalem heaps, and a den of dragons; and I will make the cities of Judah desolate, without an inhabitant.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis est vir sapiens qui intelligat hoc,  et ad quem verbum oris Domini fiat, ut annuntiet istud,  quare perierit terra, et exusta sit quasi desertum,  eo quod non sit qui pertranseat ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִֽי־הָאִ֤ישׁ הֶחָכָם֙ וְיָבֵ֣ן אֶת־זֹ֔את וַאֲשֶׁ֨ר דִּבֶּ֧ר פִּֽי־יְהֹוָ֛ה אֵלָ֖יו וְיַגִּדָ֑הּ עַל־מָה֙ אָבְדָ֣ה הָאָ֔רֶץ נִצְּתָ֥ה כַמִּדְבָּ֖ר מִבְּלִ֥י עֹבֵֽר׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Who is the wise man, that may understand this? and who is he to whom the mouth of the Lord hath spoken, that he may declare it, for what the land perisheth and is burned up like a wilderness, that none passeth through?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Dominus :  Quia dereliquerunt legem meam quam dedi eis,  et non audierunt vocem meam,  et non ambulaverunt in ea,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר יְהֹוָ֔ה עַל־עׇזְבָם֙ אֶת־תּ֣וֹרָתִ֔י אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָתַ֖תִּי לִפְנֵיהֶ֑ם וְלֹא־שָׁמְע֥וּ בְקוֹלִ֖י וְלֹא־הָ֥לְכוּ בָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: And the Lord saith, Because they have forsaken my law which I set before them, and have not obeyed my voice, neither walked therein;

verses.latin_vulgate: et abierunt post pravitatem cordis sui,  et post Baalim, quod didicerunt a patribus suis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֣לְכ֔וּ אַחֲרֵ֖י שְׁרִר֣וּת לִבָּ֑ם וְאַֽחֲרֵי֙ הַבְּעָלִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר לִמְּד֖וּם אֲבוֹתָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: But have walked after the imagination of their own heart, and after Baalim, which their fathers taught them:

verses.latin_vulgate: idcirco hæc dicit Dominus exercituum, Deus Israël :  Ecce ego cibabo populum istum absinthio,  et potum dabo eis aquam fellis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן כֹּה־אָמַ֞ר יְהֹוָ֤ה צְבָאוֹת֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל הִנְנִ֧י מַאֲכִילָ֛ם אֶת־הָעָ֥ם הַזֶּ֖ה לַעֲנָ֑ה וְהִשְׁקִיתִ֖ים מֵי־רֹֽאשׁ׃
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel; Behold, I will feed them, even this people, with wormwood, and give them water of gall to drink.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dispergam eos in gentibus  quas non noverunt ipsi et patres eorum,  et mittam post eos gladium,  donec consumantur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַהֲפִֽצוֹתִים֙ בַּגּוֹיִ֔ם אֲשֶׁר֙ לֹ֣א יָדְע֔וּ הֵ֖מָּה וַאֲבוֹתָ֑ם וְשִׁלַּחְתִּ֤י אַֽחֲרֵיהֶם֙ אֶת־הַחֶ֔רֶב עַ֥ד כַּלּוֹתִ֖י אוֹתָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: I will scatter them also among the heathen, whom neither they nor their fathers have known: and I will send a sword after them, till I have consumed them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus exercituum, Deus Israël :  Contemplamini, et vocate lamentatrices, et veniant :  et ad eas quæ sapientes sunt mittite, et properent :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֔וֹת הִתְבּ֥וֹנְנ֛וּ וְקִרְא֥וּ לַמְקוֹנְנ֖וֹת וּתְבוֹאֶ֑ינָה וְאֶל־הַחֲכָמ֥וֹת שִׁלְח֖וּ וְתָבֽוֹאנָה׃
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord of hosts, Consider ye, and call for the mourning women, that they may come; and send for cunning women, that they may come:

verses.latin_vulgate: festinent, et assumant super nos lamentum :  deducant oculi nostri lacrimas,  et palpebræ nostræ defluant aquis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּתְמַהֵ֕רְנָה וְתִשֶּׂ֥נָה עָלֵ֖ינוּ נֶ֑הִי וְתֵרַ֤דְנָה עֵינֵ֙ינוּ֙ דִּמְעָ֔ה וְעַפְעַפֵּ֖ינוּ יִזְּלוּ־מָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: And let them make haste, and take up a wailing for us, that our eyes may run down with tears, and our eyelids gush out with waters.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia vox lamentationis audita est de Sion :  Quomodo vastati sumus,  et confusi vehementer ?  quia dereliquimus terram ;  quoniam dejecta sunt tabernacula nostra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י ק֥וֹל נְהִ֛י נִשְׁמַ֥ע מִצִּיּ֖וֹן אֵ֣יךְ שֻׁדָּ֑דְנוּ בֹּ֤שְׁנֽוּ מְאֹד֙ כִּֽי־עָזַ֣בְנוּ אָ֔רֶץ כִּ֥י הִשְׁלִ֖יכוּ מִשְׁכְּנוֹתֵֽינוּ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: For a voice of wailing is heard out of Zion, How are we spoiled! we are greatly confounded, because we have forsaken the land, because our dwellings have cast us out.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audite ergo, mulieres, verbum Domini,  et assumant aures vestræ sermonem oris ejus,  et docete filias vestras lamentum,  et unaquæque proximam suam planctum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־שְׁמַ֤עְנָה נָשִׁים֙ דְּבַר־יְהֹוָ֔ה וְתִקַּ֥ח אׇזְנְכֶ֖ם דְּבַר־פִּ֑יו וְלַמֵּ֤דְנָה בְנֽוֹתֵיכֶם֙ נֶ֔הִי וְאִשָּׁ֥ה רְעוּתָ֖הּ קִינָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Yet hear the word of the Lord, O ye women, and let your ear receive the word of his mouth, and teach your daughters wailing, and every one her neighbour lamentation.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia ascendit mors per fenestras nostras ;  ingressa est domos nostras,  disperdere parvulos deforis,  juvenes de plateis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־עָ֤לָֽה מָ֙וֶת֙ בְּחַלּוֹנֵ֔ינוּ בָּ֖א בְּאַרְמְנוֹתֵ֑ינוּ לְהַכְרִ֤ית עוֹלָל֙ מִח֔וּץ בַּחוּרִ֖ים מֵרְחֹבֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: For death is come up into our windows, and is entered into our palaces, to cut off the children from without, and the young men from the streets.

verses.latin_vulgate: Loquere :  Hæc dicit Dominus :  Et cadet morticinum hominis  quasi stercus super faciem regionis,  et quasi fœnum post tergum metentis,  et non est qui colligat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דַּבֵּ֗ר כֹּ֚ה נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה וְנָֽפְלָה֙ נִבְלַ֣ת הָאָדָ֔ם כְּדֹ֖מֶן עַל־פְּנֵ֣י הַשָּׂדֶ֑ה וּכְעָמִ֛יר מֵאַחֲרֵ֥י הַקֹּצֵ֖ר וְאֵ֥ין מְאַסֵּֽף׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Speak, Thus saith the Lord, Even the carcases of men shall fall as dung upon the open field, and as the handful after the harvestman, and none shall gather them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus :  Non glorietur sapiens in sapientia sua,  et non glorietur fortis in fortitudine sua,  et non glorietur dives in divitiis suis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֣ה ׀ אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֗ה אַל־יִתְהַלֵּ֤ל חָכָם֙ בְּחׇכְמָת֔וֹ וְאַל־יִתְהַלֵּ֥ל הַגִּבּ֖וֹר בִּגְבוּרָת֑וֹ אַל־יִתְהַלֵּ֥ל עָשִׁ֖יר בְּעׇשְׁרֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord, Let not the wise man glory in his wisdom, neither let the mighty man glory in his might, let not the rich man glory in his riches:

verses.latin_vulgate: sed in hoc glorietur, qui gloriatur,  scire et nosse me,  quia ego sum Dominus qui facio misericordiam,  et judicium, et justitiam in terra :  hæc enim placent mihi, ait Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י אִם־בְּזֹ֞את יִתְהַלֵּ֣ל הַמִּתְהַלֵּ֗ל הַשְׂכֵּל֮ וְיָדֹ֣עַ אוֹתִי֒ כִּ֚י אֲנִ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה עֹ֥שֶׂה חֶ֛סֶד מִשְׁפָּ֥ט וּצְדָקָ֖ה בָּאָ֑רֶץ כִּֽי־בְאֵ֥לֶּה חָפַ֖צְתִּי נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: But let him that glorieth glory in this, that he understandeth and knoweth me, that I am the Lord which exercise lovingkindness, judgment, and righteousness, in the earth: for in these things I delight, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce dies veniunt, dicit Dominus,  et visitabo super omnem qui circumcisum habet præputium,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֛ה יָמִ֥ים בָּאִ֖ים נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה וּפָ֣קַדְתִּ֔י עַל־כׇּל־מ֖וּל בְּעׇרְלָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Behold, the days come, saith the Lord, that I will punish all them which are circumcised with the uncircumcised;

verses.latin_vulgate: super Ægyptum, et super Juda, et super Edom,  et super filios Ammon, et super Moab ;  et super omnes qui attonsi sunt in comam,  habitantes in deserto :  quia omnes gentes habent præputium,  omnis autem domus Israël incircumcisi sunt corde.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־מִצְרַ֣יִם וְעַל־יְהוּדָ֗ה וְעַל־אֱד֞וֹם וְעַל־בְּנֵ֤י עַמּוֹן֙ וְעַל־מוֹאָ֔ב וְעַל֙ כׇּל־קְצוּצֵ֣י פֵאָ֔ה הַיֹּשְׁבִ֖ים בַּמִּדְבָּ֑ר כִּ֤י כׇל־הַגּוֹיִם֙ עֲרֵלִ֔ים וְכׇל־בֵּ֥ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל עַרְלֵי־לֵֽב׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Egypt, and Judah, and Edom, and the children of Ammon, and Moab, and all that are in the utmost corners, that dwell in the wilderness: for all these nations are uncircumcised, and all the house of Israel are uncircumcised in the heart.
